_comment: Layer-2 routing tests for the System_Design_SelfLearn setup (5 skills: 3 patterns + 2 system-design). Each skill lists prompts that SHOULD route to it (should_fire) and prompts that must NOT (should_not_fire), including cross-course guards so the patterns and system-design skills stay in their own lane. Run: python tools/validate_claude_setup.py claude-setups/System_Design_SelfLearn --route. Default runner is a deterministic stemmed-Jaccard nearest-description classifier (stdlib); add --route-model to check the real router.
